description: Provides Teamfight Tactics (TFT) game data including champion builds, item combinations, meta decks, augments, and play style recommendations.

tools.name: tft_get_champion_item_build
tools.description: Retrieves recommended item builds for a specific TFT champion, including item priority and win rate statistics.

champion_name.description: The name of the TFT champion to get item build recommendations for.
The name of the TFT champion for which the build is provided.

items.description: List of recommended items for the champion, ordered by effectiveness.

item_name.description: The name of the recommended TFT item.

priority.description: The priority ranking of this item for the champion (lower is higher priority).

win_rate.description: The win rate percentage when this item is equipped on the champion.

tools.name: tft_get_play_style
tools.description: Retrieves play style recommendations and strategies for different TFT gameplay approaches.

style.description: The play style name to get recommendations for (e.g., 'aggro', 'economy', 'reroll'). If omitted, returns default or general recommendations.
The name of the play style being described.

description.description: A detailed explanation of the play style and its core principles.

recommendations.description: List of strategic recommendations and tips for executing this play style effectively.

tools.name: tft_list_augments
tools.description: Retrieves a list of TFT augments with their tier, description, and performance statistics.

limit.description: The maximum number of augments to return. If omitted, returns all available augments.

augments.description: List of TFT augments with their details and performance data.

name.description: The name of the TFT augment.

tier.description: The tier classification of the augment (e.g., 'Silver', 'Gold', 'Prismatic').

description.description: The in-game description explaining the augment's effect.

win_rate.description: The win rate percentage when this augment is selected.

tools.name: tft_list_champions_for_item
tools.description: Retrieves champion recommendations for a specific TFT item, showing which champions benefit most from equipping it.

item_name.description: The name of the TFT item to find champion recommendations for.

champions.description: List of champions recommended for the specified item, ranked by synergy.

champion_name.description: The name of the TFT champion recommended for this item.

synergy_score.description: A score indicating how well the item synergizes with the champion's kit and role.

win_rate.description: The win rate percentage when this champion uses the specified item.

tools.name: tft_list_item_combinations
tools.description: Retrieves TFT item combination recipes showing which base components combine to create completed items.

limit.description: The maximum number of item combinations to return. If omitted, returns all available combinations.

combinations.description: List of item combination recipes showing how to craft completed items.

item1.description: The name of the first base component item.

item2.description: The name of the second base component item.

result.description: The name of the completed item created from combining the two components.

description.description: The in-game description of the resulting completed item's effect.

tools.name: tft_list_meta_decks
tools.description: Retrieves current meta deck compositions with their champions, traits, and performance statistics.

tier.description: Filter decks by tier classification (e.g., 'S', 'A', 'B'). If omitted, returns decks from all tiers.

limit.description: The maximum number of meta decks to return. If omitted, returns all available decks.

decks.description: List of current meta deck compositions with performance data.

name.description: The community name or identifier for this deck composition.

champions.description: List of TFT champion names that comprise this deck composition.

traits.description: List of trait synergies activated by this deck composition.

win_rate.description: The win rate percentage achieved by players using this deck composition.

play_rate.description: The percentage of games in which this deck composition is played.
